untranslatable_reason: Megaphone (One Side Horizontal) requires simultaneous trend line analysis: horizontal bottom support (two low touches at same level) and ascending top trend line (two or more minor high touches). Available indicators cannot precisely model dual trend line slopes with their specific touch counts and the expanding volatility cone geometry in a single bar. Pattern requires multi-bar structural recognition beyond point-in-time comparisons. Approximation above uses expanding volatility (bb_bandwidth) and higher highs/lows, but cannot validate the exact horizontal bottom or ascending top geometry.
